html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: The Gorge

GenericFull

The Altar of Gnaw is a structure exclusive to The Gorge event in Don't Starve Together, found near the Mossy Gateway in the starting area. Food offerings can be placed on it to appease the Gnaw. Later on, the Ancient Key can be slotted into it to win the match.

Gallery

  • The Altar of Gnaw as found in The Gorge.
  • Mumsy making an offering on The Altar of Gnaw as seen in the Gorge cinematic.
  • Wickerbottom making an offering on The Altar of Gnaw as seen in the Gorge cinematic.
  • The Altar of Gnaw as seen in an image for the Gorge Tournament posted by Klei Entertainment on 7/6/2018.

GenericFull
“We'd better start cooking some offerings.”
–Wilson
“Don't. Look. Up.”
–Willow
“Little stone. Wolfgang will cook for you.”
–Wolfgang
“The monster's hunger shall never cease.”
–Wendy
“IT WISHES TO CONSUME”
–WX-78
“What is this "Gnaw", I wonder?”
–Wickerbottom
“We gotta load it up with good eats.”
–Woodie
“Best offer it something if we enjoy living.”
–Maxwell
“The beast gröws restless when tis nöt fed.”
–Wigfrid
“I think it's hungry.”
–Webber
“Needs belly stuff”
–Wormwood
“Moss has grown over some sorta socket in the base.”
–Winona
“A place to place a plate!”
–Wortox
“That where food goes.”
–Wurt
“We'd better start cooking some offerings.”
–Walter
“We'd better start cooking some offerings.”
–Wanda
“It's in the process of digestinating.”
–Wilson
“I wonder where all the food goes. Probably somewhere gross.”
–Willow
“Enjoy hearty meal from Wolfgang!”
–Wolfgang
“We have prolonged our horrific demise.”
–Wendy
“IT IS CURRENTLY REFUELING”
–WX-78
“That should tide it over while I prepare our next dish.”
–Wickerbottom
“It hasn't finished the food we gave it.”
–Woodie
“I'm not sure how it draws magic from this.”
–Maxwell
“Accept my öffering, öh mighty göds.”
–Wigfrid
“We hope it's good.”
–Webber
“For you, Sky Mouth!”
–Wormwood
“That should keep it busy fer a bit.”
–Winona
“It's full as full can be!”
–Wortox
“It just ate!”
–Wurt
“It's in the process of digestinating.”
–Walter
“It's in the process of digestinating.”
–Wanda
The Altar of Gnaw is a structure exclusive to The Gorge event in Don't Starve Together, found near the Mossy Gateway in the starting area. Food offerings can be placed on it to appease the Gnaw. Later on, the Ancient Key can be slotted into it to win the match.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bàn Thờ Gnaw là một công trình kiến ​​trúc dành riêng cho sự kiện The Gorge trong Don't Starve Together, được tìm thấy gần Cổng Rêu ở khu vực xuất phát. Đồ ăn có thể được đặt lên đó để xoa dịu Gnaw. Sau này, Chìa Khóa Cổ có thể được nhét vào đó để giành chiến thắng trong trận đấu.
title: The Altar of Gnaw

'''The Altar of Gnaw''' is a structure exclusive to [[The Gorge]] [[:Category:Events|event]] in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', found near the [[Ancient Gateway#The Gorge|Mossy Gateway]] in the starting area. [[The Gorge Recipes|Food offerings]] can be placed on it to appease the [[Gnaw]]. Later on, the [[Ancient_Key#The_Gorge|Ancient Key]] can be slotted into it to win the match.
